questionHtml:
The energy levels of an atom are shown. How many photons of energy greater than 1.9 eV can be emitted by this atom?


A.  1

B.  2

C.  3

D.  4

meta.title: The energy levels of an atom are shown. How many photons of energy greater than 1.9 eV can be emitted by this atom? A. 1 B. 2 C. 3 D. 4
